flashcards.definition: Expressing numbers as a × 10ⁿ where 1 ≤ a < 10.
The number 'a' in scientific notation (must be 1–9.999…).
The power of 10 in scientific notation; positive for large, negative for small numbers.
The regular decimal notation of a number (e.g., 602,000,000,000,000,000,000,000).
The power of 10 closest to a quantity; used for quick comparisons.
